name: Thomas
oracleText:
Whenever you draw your second card each turn, investigate.
Whenever you sacrifice a Clue, scry 1.
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Caravaggio's "The Incredulity of Saint Thomas" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Doubter

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Caravaggio, The Incredulity of Saint Thomas
classics.sourceNotes: This is the canonical old-master image for Thomas’s doubt and confession.
